Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Inez Salvador'S Answers To Questions Propounded At Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Andrew Dimitriou, for Plaintiff/Moving party
Laura S. Flynn, for Defendant/opposing party
Ruling:
Hearing held. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant Inez Salvador's Answers To Questions Propounded At Deposition is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is denied as to Question 1 as the reasons deponent went to her attorney's office seek the content of her communications with counsel.
The motion is denied as to Question 2 as the number of pieces of property is protected by the deponent's right to financial privacy,.
The motion is granted as to Question 3, limited by the ruling as to Question 2.
The motion is granted as to the remaining questions.
The deposition shall be resumed soley for the purpose of obtaining the answers to the questions allowed by this order including visits and knowledge of condition of the property and reasonable follow-up to those questions.
Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
